hero_subtitle: Biya Cikin Sauƙi, Sauri Wajen Sa Kati.
hero_description: Kasance tare da amintaccen dandalin VTU a Najeriya. PayStation yana samar da kati, data, da biyan kuɗi nan take tare da cikakken tsaro.
footer_tagline: Inganta rayuwarka ta hanyar biyan kuɗi cikin sauri da sauƙi.
why_choose: Me yasa za a zaɓi PayStation?
why_desc: Duk abin da kuke buƙata don ma'amaloli na dijital a cikin asusu guda.
data_rates_desc: Muna ba da mafi sauƙin tsarin data a duk hanyoyin sadarwa na Najeriya.
testimonials_desc: Saurari abin da masu amfani da mu da wakilanmu ke cewa game da PayStation.
faq_subtitle: Nemo amsoshi ga tambayoyin yau da kullun game da amfani da PayStation.
chat_with_us: Kuna da sauran tambayoyi? Yi magana da mu
ready_to_simplify: Shirye don sauƙaƙe rayuwar dijital taku?
trust_paystation: Kasance cikin dubban yan Najeriya da suka amince da PayStation kowace rana.
auth_login_desc: Shigar da bayanan ku don shiga asusun ku
auth_signup_desc: Buɗe asusu don fara amfani da PayStation
auth_pass_mismatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba
otp_desc: Mun aika lambar tabbatarwa zuwa imel ɗinka. Da fatan za a shigar da ita a ƙasa.
otp_resend: Ba a sami lamba ba? Sake aika
promo_desc: Samu kashi 10% akan duk ma'amalar farko na waɗanda ka gayyata.
agent_success_msg: Your application has been submitted for admin review.
agent_req_usage: Minimum 7 days of active usage required.
agent_req_trans: Minimum ₦10,000 total successful transactions in the last 7 days required.
feat_mobile_desc: Katin waya da data nan take ga dukkan hanyoyin sadarwa.
feat_bills_desc: Biyan wutar lantarki da kudin DSTV, GOTV nan take.
feat_exam_desc: Samu katin WAEC, NECO da JAMB nan take.
feat_secure_desc: Gudanar da kudadenka cikin aminci da tsaro.
faq_a1_s2: Idan ba ka yi rajista ba, danna 'rajista' don farawa
faq_a1_s3: Bayan ka shiga, danna 'Fund Wallet' don saka kudi
faq_a1_s4: Danna 'buy data' sannan ka zaɓi hanyar sadarwa da adadin da kake so
faq_a1_s5: Danna 'send' sannan ka shigar da PIN ɗinka
faq_a1_s6: Wanda aka tura mawa zai sami sanarwa nan take
faq_q2: Wadanne lambobi ne na duba ragowar data?
faq_q3: Yaya zan saka kudi a asusuna?
faq_a3_desc: Kuna iya saka kudi ta hanyoyi hudu:
faq_a4_s3: Jira minti 1-15, za a sami data nan take.
agent_promo: Farashin nan na yau da kullun ne. Kasance Wakili don samun rangwame.
err_generic: Wani abu ya faru ba daidai ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
err_auth_fail: Imel ko kalmar sirri ba daidai ba.
err_user_exists: An riga an yi rajista da wannan imel ko sunan shiga.
err_otp_invalid: Lambar tabbatarwa ba ta da kyau. Da fatan za a sake dubawa.
success_signup: An buɗe asusu! Da fatan za a tabbatar da imel ɗinka.
tc_agree_error: Dole ne ka amince da sharuɗɗan don ci gaba.
tc_content_1_text: Barka da zuwa PayStation. Ta amfani da ayyukanmu, kun amince da waɗannan sharuɗɗan. Da fatan za a karanta su a tsanake.
tc_content_2_text: Kuna da alhakin kiyaye sirrin asusunku da kalmar sirrinku. Kun amince da karɓar alhakin duk ayyukan da ke faruwa a asusunku.
tc_content_3_text: Duk VTU, data, da biyan kuɗi ana sarrafa su nan take. Tabbatar kun samar da bayanan mai karɓa daidai.
tc_content_4_text: Ba za ku iya amfani da PayStation don kowane aiki na haram ba, gami da zamba, ko samun damar shiga wasu tsarin ba tare da izini ba.
tc_content_5_text: PayStation ba shi da alhakin kowane lalacewa da ya faru sakamakon amfani da ayyukanmu.
